name: Explosion
desc: Server notifies the client of an explosion (TNT, creeper, bed in Nether/End, etc).

fields.name: motionX/Y/Z
fields.desc: Player knockback velocity from the explosion

notes: Affected blocks are sent as byte triplets (x, y, z) relative to the explosion center. The client applies particle effects and knockback to the local player.

implementation.overview: S27PacketExplosion sends explosion data (TNT, creeper, bed in Nether/End). Fields: x/y/z (float center), strength (float), affected block positions, and motionX/Y/Z (float player knockback). The motion values are ALWAYS treated as a second source of knockback by Velocity modules. Most anti-knockback implementations handle BOTH S12 and S27 identically — scale or cancel both.

modules.name: Velocity / AntiKnockback
modules.purpose: Cancel or scale explosion knockback alongside entity velocity (S12).
modules.how_it_works: Same pattern as S12 — check if the packet is S27, then scale or cancel motionX/Y/Z.

implementation.general_hooks: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleExplosion(). Same pattern as S12 — the motionX/Y/Z fields use * 8000 encoding. Always handled together with S12.
implementation.client_variations:
Tenacity 5.1: S27 handled alongside S12 in same Velocity module.
Jello 0.1: Only handles S27 (S12 commented out).
Lycoris 2.0: Combined check for S12||S27.
